// About me
Rabban
Ali

IoT and software developer from Sialkot, Pakistan. I build connected systems — ESP32 robots, home automation, sensor dashboards — and the web and Python software that ties them together. Freelancing since 2021, learning by shipping.

Hardware & IoT
ESP32 / ESP8266Wi-Fi · Bluetooth · Firmware
Motor DriversL298N · PWM control
SensorsUltrasonic · IR · DHT11
ProtocolsMQTT · HTTP · Serial · I2C
Arduino IDE / PlatformIOC++ firmware
Software
PythonFlask · Tkinter · Scripting
JavaScriptDOM · ES6+ · Web APIs
HTML / CSSResponsive · Semantic
Git & GitHubVersion control
Illustrator / PhotoshopSide work
Education
ICS — Computer Science
Maqsood Intermediate Academy, Sialkot
Apr 2025 → Sep 2027
Certifications
Graphic Designing
Digiskills Pakistan
Python Programming — Zero to Mastery
Andrei Neagoie
Work Experience
IoT & Embedded Developer
Independent Projects — Self-directed
2024 → Present
Building ESP32/ESP8266-based systems: RC vehicles, sensor dashboards, home automation nodes, autonomous robots.
Graphic Designer
Fiverr & Freelancer — Remote
Jul 2021 → Sep 2023
Worked with clients worldwide. 50+ works on Behance. Client communication, pricing, project management.
IT & Operations Generalist
Local School — Volunteer, Sialkot
Dec 2023 → Apr 2024
Built custom school management software. IT support for 10+ staff.

// Future goals & projects
What’s
next.
01
IoT Cloud Platform

Self-hosted backend — devices publish via MQTT, Flask stores it, live dashboard visualizes everything.

In Progress
02
Autonomous Vehicle V2

Evolve ESP Car with PID motor control, ultrasonic + IR sensors, and ESP32-CAM lane detection.

Planning
03
Smart Agriculture Node

Low-power ESP32 soil moisture and climate monitoring with local server logging and SMS alerts.
